tasks.title: Fix Streamlit KeyError in kpi_templates.py
tasks.description: Resolve the KeyError by ensuring DataFrame columns match the expected indicator definition fields.
tasks.verification_method: Navigate to Templates page in Streamlit and verify no crash occurs.

tasks.title: Fix missing data in Template page
tasks.description: Ensure existing template settings are correctly loaded and displayed in both Tkinter and Streamlit.
tasks.verification_method: Add a template and verify it persists and appears correctly in both GUIs.

tasks.title: Align Streamlit Settings with Tkinter dynamic targets
tasks.description: Implement the dynamic target list manager (ID/Name assignment) in Streamlit.
tasks.verification_method: Verify target list management in Streamlit matches Tkinter functionality.

tasks.title: Implement Data Recovery in Streamlit
tasks.description: Add 'Restore from Backup' functionality to the Streamlit interface.
tasks.verification_method: Perform a successful restore operation through the Streamlit UI.

tasks.title: Enhance Global Split UI Transparency
tasks.description: Show clearly which KPIs and Years are involved for each split profile in both GUIs.
tasks.verification_method: Verify involved KPIs/Years list in Global Split details.

tasks.title: Support heterogeneous rules per KPI in Global Split
tasks.description: Allow a single Global Split profile to manage different distribution profiles for each KPI.
tasks.verification_method: Verify different distribution results for two KPIs linked to the same split.

tasks.title: Emphasize Global Split override in KPI Management
tasks.description: Automatically switch and mark local split profile as 'Global Split' when linked.
tasks.verification_method: Link a KPI to a split and verify the local profile indicator updates.

tasks.title: Add Analytics Metrics (YoY and Trend)
tasks.description: Implement Year-over-Year comparison and trend slope analysis in both GUIs.
tasks.verification_method: Verify presence of YoY % and trend charts in Analysis tabs.

tasks.title: Implement Lean Export Mode
tasks.description: Create a high-portability export mode providing minimal [KPI, Date, Target] columns.
tasks.verification_method: Generate a 'Lean' CSV and verify it contains the minimal column set.

tasks.title: Prepare FastAPI entry point
tasks.description: Implement a lightweight API endpoint for external target analysis connection.

tasks.title: Streamlit Visual Node Editor
tasks.description: Implement an interactive visual node graph editor for formulas in Streamlit.
tasks.verification_method: Successfully create a formula using visual nodes in Streamlit.
